programme.title: Blankety Blank
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Joe Marler, Sue Perkins, Trevor Nelson, Josh Pugh, Tasha Ghouri and Sara Barron try to fill in the missing blanks and win prizes for some lucky contestants.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Rip Off Britain
programme.desc: The fake websites luring shoppers with so-called expert reviews.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is in Wales, where a mixed unit is in surprisingly good condition.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles heads to Sussex, where experts Raj Bisram and Nick Hall join the teams as they search for the best items to sell at auction.

programme.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.desc: The team try to help a woman in Doncaster who is being scammed while at work, ending up in a tit-for-tat battle with the scammer to persuade her that they're not part of the scam.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Sea Monster
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates the discovery of a lifetime: the giant skull of a prehistoric sea monster, known as a pliosaur - the Tyrannosaurus rex of the seas.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: In true Escape to the Country style, today's couple (both former international rugby players) want to leave London in search of a rural idyll in Dorset.

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Flatmates Rachel, Scott, Tara and Daniel take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the quiz where contestants try to score as few points as possible by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast by the Labour Party
programme.desc: A party election broadcast by the Labour Party for the local and mayoral elections on 7 May.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Nicola is forced to come clean to George, Ian makes a rash decision after being humiliated by Oscar, and Linda makes a decision for the sake of her family.

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: The designers team up to create uplifting spaces at a London homelessness charity, and Dara Ó Briain pops by to check in on Alan and the new rooms.

programme.title: MasterChef
programme.desc: It's time for the second heat of the week, with six more home cooks putting themselves in the culinary spotlight, ready to show the judges that they have what it takes.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1989. Niall invites Ruben to join him for freshers' week, with devastating consequences. Contains very strong language and graphic violent scenes.

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs
programme.desc: An FBI trainee shares her nightmare memory in the hope of stopping a serial killer. Contains very strong language, prolonged violence and upsetting scenes.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Rip Off Britain: Scams
programme.desc: How much can you trust your MOT? The team investigate the so-called 'ghost' MOTs available for sale and hear from the mum whose second-hand car was far from roadworthy.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin is in London to meet a mum helping her daughter to get on the property ladder. And Jacqui's perplexed by the layout of two linked flats that she feels should just be one.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Students take on lecturers at an antiques fair in Wetherby, with experts Philip Serrell and Jonathan Pratt. Meanwhile, Caroline shows fair-goers a horsehair-stuffed mystery item.

programme.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Scam Interceptors
programme.desc: A man is on the phone to a tech support scammer, leaving the team struggling to find a way to get through to him and stop the scam. And we chat to a fake Jennifer Aniston.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Sea Dragon
programme.desc: Following David Attenborough as he attempts to animate the life of the ichthyosaur whose 200-million-year-old fossil remains were found on Britain's Jurassic coast.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: The owners of six Irish wolfhounds look for a property in Suffolk with a bit more space.

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Friends Jordan, Allan, Archie and Lewis take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the quiz where contestants try to score as few points as possible by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and JB Gill bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian instantly regrets his actions, Grant steps in to help a friend, and Gina and Harry are forced to come clean.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team revive a cherished rocking horse, a spectacular set of conga drums, and a logbook that played a key role in British LGBTQ+ history.

programme.title: Amandaland
programme.desc: Amanda uses a school careers talk to prove she's not shallow. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Only Child
programme.desc: Richard just wants to hide away from the world, but Ken has other ideas - mainly forcing him to join the protest group fighting to save the local allotments.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: MOTD: UEFA Champions League Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of the second-leg matches in the semi-finals of the UEFA Champions League.

programme.title: Celebrity Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Phil Wang, Anna Williamson, Miles Jupp and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell face the Bridge of Lies.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.
